name: my-codex-skill
description: Archive Codex session transcripts into per-session Markdown files with hook-driven updates.

interface.longDescription: Render Codex CLI or IDE transcripts into date- and session-scoped Markdown archives using Stop and SessionStart hooks.
defaultPrompt: Archive this Codex session into Markdown and show the output path.
Explain how to install the session archiver hooks for this clone.
Adjust the Markdown archive format for my Codex transcripts.
